selection_note: STA display branches pruned to proximal outlets. Legacy mode keeps STA_0, frontal branch, and transverse facial artery. three_yellow_outlets mode keeps STA_0, STA_1, STA_7, and transverse facial artery per side. redline_three_outlets mode keeps STA_0 past the STA_1 branch point, STA_1, and transverse facial artery per side. sta_major_branch_outlets mode keeps STA_0, STA_1, STA_4, STA_7, frontal branch, and transverse facial artery per side.
